arabic:
وعن جرير رضي الله عنه قال‏:‏ سألت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  عن نظر الفجأة فقال‏:‏ ‏
"‏اصرف بصرك‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Jarir bin 'Abdullah (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: I asked the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) about (the Islamic ruling on) accidental glance (i.e., at a woman one is not Islamically allowed to look at) and he ordered me to turn my eyes away..

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
